We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Logistics Manager

Job Location: Ikeja / Alausa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities&nbsp;


	Transportation &amp; Fleet Management:Selecting reliable carriers, optimizing shipping routes, and negotiating freight rates to minimize transportation costs.
	Inventory &amp; Warehouse Operations:Tracking stock levels, organizing warehouse layouts to ensure efficient picking/packing, and preventing overstocking or stockouts.
	Vendor &amp; Supply Chain Relations:Liaising with manufacturers, suppliers, and third-party logistics (3PL) providers to maintain a smooth flow of materials.
	Data Analysis &amp; Budgeting:Establishing and tracking key performance indicators (KPIs) like delivery accuracy and cost-per-mile, while managing the logistics budget.
	Team Leadership:Recruiting, training, and supervising warehouse and logistics staff to meet productivity goals.
	Compliance &amp; Risk Management:Ensuring all cross-border or local transport adheres to safety standards, customs regulations, and environmental guidelines.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: admin@yehgs.co.uk using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, Contact, 08129207496.",

Logistics Manager Job at YEHGS UK Limited




        
    

        
        YEHGS UK Limited deals on sales of Coffee, Coffee machine and coffee accessories. We are the major distrubotrs of the product mention above.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Logistics Manager

Job Location: Ikeja / Alausa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities 
     

            
    




	Transportation & Fleet Management:Selecting reliable carriers, optimizing shipping routes, and negotiating freight rates to minimize transportation costs.
	Inventory & Warehouse Operations:Tracking stock levels, organizing warehouse layouts to ensure efficient picking/packing, and preventing overstocking or stockouts.
	Vendor & Supply Chain Relations:Liaising with manufacturers, suppliers, and third-party logistics (3PL) providers to maintain a smooth flow of materials.
	Data Analysis & Budgeting:Establishing and tracking key performance indicators (KPIs) like delivery accuracy and cost-per-mile, while managing the logistics budget.
	Team Leadership:Recruiting, training, and supervising warehouse and logistics staff to meet productivity goals.
	Compliance & Risk Management:Ensuring all cross-border or local transport adheres to safety standards, customs regulations, and environmental guidelines.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, Contact, 08129207496.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Electronic PayPlus Limited
content:
Electronic PayPlus Limited is a foremost electronic payment company with years of experience in the industry. We are a card-based solutions provider primarily focused on providing total payment solutions to the banking industry and other payment institutions. We offer a wide variety of plastic cards from the simplest PVC to the most sophisticated smart contact and contact-less cards.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Cost & Management Accountant

Job Location: Ibeju-Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	A Cost & Management Accountant drives profitability by tracking, analyzing, and controlling operational costs.
	They translate financial data into actionable strategies. Core duties include standard costing, budget preparation, variance analysis, and managing month-end ledgers.


Core Responsibilities


	Cost Accounting: Establish standard costs for materials, labor, and overheads. Conduct periodic reconciliations and variance analyses comparing actual costs against standard budgets.
	Management Reporting: Prepare detailed cash flow forecasts, profitability statements, and budget reports to assist executives in strategic planning.
	Financial Modeling: Develop scenarios to evaluate pricing strategies, investment decisions, and make-versus-buy choices.
	Inventory & Audit Control: Monitor inventory levels and coordinate physical audits. Ensure compliance with accounting standards (e.g., GAAP).
	Process Optimization: Identify financial inefficiencies, reduce waste, and recommend cost-saving solutions.


Key Requirements


	Education & Certification: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or Economics with 5-10 years experience.
	Certifications like the Certified Management Accountant (CMA) or ACCA are highly preferred.
	Technical Skills: Advanced proficiency in ERP systems (e.g., SAP, Oracle), data analytics tools, and Microsoft Excel.
	Analytical Mindset: Strong financial modeling, risk assessment, and problem-solving capabilities.


Salary
N500,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 31st July, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications and CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject.

 

 

2.) Milling and Embedding Machine Operator

Job Location: Ibeju Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A Milling and Embedding Operator is responsible for setting up and operating automated machinery to mill cavities into raw card bodies and embed microchips (modules) into them.
	They ensure production aligns with strict technical parameters, maintain equipment, and perform quality checks on the finished smart cards.


Key Responsibilities


	Machine Setup & Calibration: Configure mills and embedding tools based on job orders, blueprints, and specific technical parameters.
	Material Management: Ensure the correct card bodies, microchips, and consumables (such as adhesive glue tape) are loaded and ready before production begins.
	Production & Monitoring: Run the production line, continuously monitor the milling/embedding depth and precision, and adjust controls (feed rates, speed) as needed.
	Quality Control: Conduct routine inspections of the products using precision measuring tools to ensure dimensions, tolerances, and placement accuracy meet strict client specifications.
	Maintenance & Troubleshooting: Perform first-level preventative maintenance, replace worn tools (e.g., punch tools), and report complex equipment failures.
	Documentation: Record job logs, production status, and material usage into the production logbook or system.


Qualifications & Skills


	Experience: 1 to 5 years of hands-on experience in CNC, smart card packaging, or electromechanical machine operation.
	Technical Aptitude: Ability to interpret work tickets, blueprints, and technical drawings.
	Physical Requirements: Must be physically fit and capable of repetitive physical tasks, including standing for long periods and lifting up to 50 pounds.
	Computer Literacy: Basic knowledge of computer systems for inputting data and running CNC programs.
	Soft Skills: High attention to detail, strong multitasking, ability to troubleshoot problems quickly, and the integrity to handle secure production materials.


Salary
N250,000 / month.

Application Closing Date: 31st July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their applications and CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Applicants must reside around Ajah and environs.

 

 

3.) Procurement and Admin Supervisor

Job Location: Ibeju Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A Procurement and Administration Supervisor oversees a company’s purchasing processes, inventory control, and daily office operations.
	The role bridges supply chain management with facility administration, ensuring that materials and services are acquired cost-effectively, while managing the team responsible for smooth daily office workflows.


Core Responsibilities
Procurement & Sourcing:


	Supplier Management: Source, vet, and maintain relationships with reliable vendors to negotiate competitive pricing, bulk discounts, and strict service level agreements (SLAs).
	Purchasing Cycles: Oversee the processing of purchase orders (POs), bid evaluations, and Requests for Proposals (RFPs) to ensure cost-efficiency and compliance with organizational policies.
	Contract Negotiation: Lead or assist in negotiating high-value contracts and monitor supplier performance against industry benchmarks.


Office Administration & Facilities


	General Operations: Oversee office facilities, utilities, and the maintenance tracking of equipment to ensure a safe and productive work environment.
	Vendor Compliance: Ensure all external contractors and service providers adhere to safety regulations, facility guidelines, and data-security policies.
	Cross-functional Support: Coordinate administrative needs across different departments, ranging from meeting logistics to document filing and auditing.


Inventory & Logistics


	Stock Optimization: Collaborate with planning teams to maintain optimal stock levels, preventing both material shortages and excess inventory overhead.
	Record Keeping: Implement and enforce robust inventory tracking, warehousing safety standards, and reconciliation systems.


Team Leadership:


	Supervision: Lead, mentor, and evaluate the performance of purchasing assistants, administrative staff, and general services personnel.
	Workflow Delegation: Assign workloads, monitor deadlines, and ensure compliance with internal purchasing and stores regulations.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Business Administration, or a related field. Professional certifications like CIPS are a major asset.


Salary
N400,000 per month. 

Application Closing Date: 30th July, 2026. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their applications and CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Applicants must reside arround Ajah and environs.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

Direct Sales Agent Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, Paytro, is a fast-growing e-commerce company committed to providing seamless online shopping and payment solutions.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Direct Sales Agent

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract
Industry: E-commerce
Work Schedule: Hybrid (2 days on site and 3 days remote)
Report to: Head,  Business Development & Operations

Role Summary
     

            
    




	They are looking for result-driven Direct Sales Agents to expand our merchant network and drive customer acquisition.
	As a Direct Sales Agent, you will be responsible for onboarding new merchants, driving sales of Paytro’s e-commerce solutions, and meeting set targets.
	You will work remotely but the preferred resident must be in Lagos.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and onboard new merchants (retailers, SMEs, etc.) onto the Paytro platform.
	Promote Paytro’s e-commerce and payment services to potential customers.
	Meet and exceed monthly sales and activation targets.
	Maintain strong relationships with assigned merchants to ensure retention.
	Collect and report market feedback, competitor activities, and customer needs.
	Participate in weekly virtual team meetings if the need arises
	Keep accurate records of sales activities using provided tools (e.g., CRM, spreadsheets).


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE, OND, HND or BSc Degree in any field is an added advantage.
	1–3 years of proven sales or direct marketing experience (e-commerce, fintech)
	Strong negotiation and communication skills.
	Self-motivated with the ability to work independently.
	Basic digital literacy (use of WhatsApp, email, Google Forms, etc.).
	Ability to work in a remote setting with minimal supervision.
	Goal-oriented and resilient.


Salary
N130,000 / month plus commision.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Digital Marketing Manager Job at Abundance Estate Limited




        
    

        
        Abundance Estate Limited is an active real estate development and property investment firm. The company focuses on providing secure landed properties, residential developments, and affordable luxury estate housing options. It operates as part of the broader corporate umbrella of the Jaswill Group

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Manager
Job Location: Abuja

Requirements
     

            
    




	Bachelor's Degree / HND or its equivalent
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enuiries, contact 08068084526.    

    

        Click here to Apply
